# Reusable Templates

Copy, don't edit in place. Each template is the canonical shape for its artifact.

- `WORK_PACKAGE_TEMPLATE.md` — the task packet handed to an implementing agent.
- `SPRINT_PLAN_TEMPLATE.md` — a themed batch of packets with parallelization map and gates.
- `ADR_TEMPLATE.md` — architecture decision record with adversarial challenge.
- `STORY_TEMPLATE.md` — user story with requirement links and acceptance criteria.
- `TEST_PLAN_TEMPLATE.md` — per-feature/per-sprint test plan.
- `AGENT_HANDOFF_TEMPLATE.md` — session closeout report.
- `SESSION_LOG_TEMPLATE.md` — conversation-archive summary entry.
- `PRECODE_AUDIT_TEMPLATE.md` — the multi-pass audit that opens the coding gate (Phase 5 → 6).
- `RELEASE_GATE_EVIDENCE_TEMPLATE.md` — evidence pack per release ring.
- `KNOWLEDGE_ENTRY_TEMPLATE.md` — one-concept knowledge file for `knowledge/okf/`.
